locations.name: Arugam Bay
locations.description: Arugam Bay is one of the most famous surfing destinations in the world and hosts international surf competitions. The long right-hand waves and warm Indian Ocean waters make it ideal for both beginner and professional surfers.

locations.name: Weligama Beach
locations.description: Weligama is a wide sandy bay known for beginner-friendly waves and safe swimming areas. Surf schools and board rentals make it one of the best places in Sri Lanka to learn surfing.

locations.name: Yala National Park
locations.description: Camping in Yala offers a wilderness experience surrounded by forests and wildlife. Visitors may see elephants, leopards, crocodiles, and exotic birds while staying in safari camps inside the park.

locations.name: Knuckles Mountain Range
locations.description: The Knuckles range is perfect for mountain camping with cloud forests, waterfalls, and dramatic landscapes. It is a UNESCO conservation area popular for eco-tourism and trekking.

locations.name: Hikkaduwa Coral Reef
locations.description: Hikkaduwa is one of Sri Lanka’s most famous snorkeling spots with vibrant coral reefs, tropical fish, and sea turtles. The clear shallow waters make it ideal for beginners.

locations.name: Pigeon Island
locations.description: Located near Nilaveli Beach, Pigeon Island National Park is known for crystal-clear waters, coral reefs, reef sharks, and colorful marine life.

locations.name: Adam's Peak (Sri Pada)
locations.description: Adam's Peak is a sacred mountain famous for its pilgrimage climb. Thousands hike to the summit overnight to witness the spectacular sunrise and the mountain’s unique shadow.

locations.name: Ella Rock
locations.description: Ella Rock offers one of the best hiking experiences in Sri Lanka. The trail passes through tea plantations, forests, and railway tracks before reaching a viewpoint overlooking the hill country.

locations.name: Ella
locations.description: Ella’s mountain landscapes and strong hill winds create ideal conditions for paragliding. The flight offers breathtaking views of valleys, tea estates, and waterfalls.

locations.name: Kandalama
locations.description: Kandalama provides scenic paragliding experiences with views over the Kandalama Lake and surrounding jungle landscapes near Sigiriya.

locations.name: Yala National Park
locations.description: Yala National Park is the most famous wildlife park in Sri Lanka and is known for having one of the highest densities of leopards in the world along with elephants, sloth bears, and crocodiles.

locations.name: Udawalawe National Park
locations.description: Udawalawe is the best place in Sri Lanka to observe wild elephants in large herds. The park also hosts deer, buffalo, crocodiles, and hundreds of bird species.

locations.name: Mirissa
locations.description: Mirissa is one of the best places in the world to see blue whales and sperm whales. Boat tours depart early morning into the deep Indian Ocean.

locations.name: Trincomalee
locations.description: Trincomalee offers excellent whale watching during the east-coast season, with chances to see blue whales, dolphins, and other marine life.

locations.name: Talalla Retreat
locations.description: Talalla Retreat is a peaceful beachfront wellness destination offering yoga, meditation, and holistic healing programs surrounded by tropical nature.

locations.name: Nilambe Meditation Centre
locations.description: Nilambe Meditation Centre near Kandy offers silent meditation retreats in a serene forest setting, focusing on Buddhist mindfulness practices.
